title: EmiTechReborn
description: Addon for EMI adding support for TechReborn. Adds support for various crafts and generators.
body:
EmiTechReborn is a mod that is an addition to EMI. This add-on adds compatibility between EMI and TechReborn, which is necessary for you if we want to see the different crafts of their TechReborn. All recipes from TechReborn are supported.
**Do not send any problems related to this mod to Issues for EMI or TechReborn!** This mod/add-on has no direct relation to EMI or TechReborn. Please follow the links to familiarize yourself with them:
[Tech Reborn](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/techreborn)
[EMI](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi)
